content: I'm getting married next year and I want to make sure our wedding menu is perfect. My fiancée, Rachel, and I are thinking of having a food truck with some of our favorite dishes.
That sounds like a great idea! Food trucks can be a lot of fun and offer a lot of flexibility. What kind of dishes are you thinking of serving? Are you looking for any specific cuisine or theme?

We're thinking of doing a mix of Italian and Mexican food, since those are our favorite cuisines. We've also been looking at some recipes from my favorite cookbook, 'Jerusalem' by Yotam Ottolenghi. Have you heard of it?
